Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Understand the Goal The user wants a comprehensive event log for process mining based on several provided ERP tables Orders Order Lines Delivery Invoice Payments The output must be in Markdown table format with columns Case ID Activity Name Timestamp Resource optional but recommended and Other Attributes

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Case ID Strategy The prompt explicitly says Identify Cases Use the order_id as the case identifier So Case ID equals order_id

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Tables and Events Mapping Orders Table Event Order Created Timestamp order_date Resource sales_person_id Attributes customer_id customer_type order_priority Order Lines Table Event Item Picked Timestamp item_picking_date Resource picker_id Attributes item_id quantity Note One order can have multiple lines so multiple events per case here Delivery Table Event 1 Order Dispatched Timestamp 1 delivery_dispatch_date Resource 1 carrier_id Event 2 Order Arrived Timestamp 2 delivery_arrival_date Resource 2 carrier_id Attributes delivery_note delivery_id Note Split deliveries possible Invoice Table Event Invoice Issued Timestamp invoice_issue_date Resource billing_person_id Attributes invoice_id invoice_amount Note Multiple invoices per order possible Payments Table Event Payment Received Timestamp payment_date payment_method payment_reference

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Payment Received implies the bank or system I will use the payment_method as an attribute or resource if no actor is clear often Payment Received implies the bank or system

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order 1001 Created 2024 01 01T09 00 00Z Picked ITEM 001 2024 01 02T10 15 00Z Picked ITEM 002 2024 01 02T11 00 00Z Dispatched DLV 5001 2024 01 03T08 30 00Z Arrived DLV 5001 2024 01 05T14 45 00Z Issued INV 1001 2024 01 06T09 00 00Z Pay PAY 2001 for INV 1001 2024 01 10T11 30 00Z

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order 1003 Created 2024 01 03T10 00 00Z Picked ITEM 002 2024 01 05T15 30 00Z Picked ITEM 006 2024 01 05T15 45 00Z Dispatched DLV 5004 2024 01 06T07 30 00Z Arrived DLV 5004 2024 01 07T20 00 00Z Issued INV 1004 2024 01 09T08 00 00Z Pay PAY 2004 2024 01 11T10 30 00Z

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order 1004 Created 2024 01 04T14 15 00Z Picked ITEM 001 2024 01 06T08 00 00Z Missing Delivery Invoice Payment data for 1004 based on tables Only include what exists

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order 1005 Created 2024 01 05T08 45 00Z Picked ITEM 007 2024 01 06T09 30 00Z Picked ITEM 002 2024 01 06T09 45 00Z Dispatched DLV 5005 2024 01 07T10 15 00Z Arrived DLV 5005 2024 01 09T11 45 00Z Issued INV 1005 2024 01 10T09 30 00Z Pay PAY 2005 2024 01 15T12 00 00Z

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Activity Name Usually keeping it high level Item Picked and putting specifics in attributes is better for process mining I will use Item Picked and include Item details in attributes

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Resource Actor Map IDs to names using the Resources table where possible for readability I will use Name and ID format for clarity

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Sorting Primary Sort Case ID Order ID Secondary Sort Timestamp

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Self Correction during generation Ensure timestamps are sorted correctly within cases For Order 1002 picking happens before dispatching

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Final Review of Requirements One row per event Yes Case ID equals order_id Yes Activities derived Yes Timestamps mapped Yes Combined data Yes Enriched resources Yes using the lookup table

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: Self Correction on Payment Resource The Payment table does not have a user ID I will list System or the Method as the resource actor or leave it blank I will populate it where explicit Sales Warehouse Billing For Payment I will use Payment Gateway or Bank
